name: edubeam-lms
description: Edubeam LMS — multi-tenant Learning Management System for government schools.

scripts.start:prod: npm --workspace packages/db run seed && npm --workspace apps/api run start
scripts.render:build: npm --workspace packages/db run use-postgres && npm --workspace packages/db run generate && npm --workspace packages/db run push && npm --workspace packages/db run seed && npm --workspace packages/db run migrate-blocks && node scripts/seed-logins.mjs && npm --workspace apps/web run build
